'''A-9''' was a [[Hangar/Legends|landing platform]] located in the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Joventusek]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Caarimon]].<ref name="BOB" /> Circa [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="date">The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' states that the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force]] campaign is set one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], an event that is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. As the Living Force adventure ''[[Below the Belt: Philology|Philology]]'' [[Cularin's disappearance|moved]] the campaign forward ten years to the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], ''[[Metatheran Caution: Belly of the Beaast|Belly of the Beaast]]'' can therefore be dated to circa [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].</ref> the [[heroes of Cularin]], a group of freelance agents from the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]], ventured to Caarimon, seeking to thwart the dispersal on the world of an [[anti-Caarite virus]], and docked their [[Starship/Legends|starship]] on A-9. The agents were greeted on the platform by the [[Caarite]] [[Nuris Blaht]] of the [[Caarimon Ministry of Conservation]].<ref name="BOB" />

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Metatheran Caution: Belly of the Beaast}} {{1st}}
